summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features for Zektrix UK Competition Platform: Password Reset, Admin User Management (block/edit/delete), Email Bot endpoints, and UI components. All backend API tests passed (20/21, 1 skipped). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset returns success message (prevents email enumeration)
Backend: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset validates email format (422 for invalid)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects invalid token (400 error)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password accepts request for registered user
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns users list with proper structure
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can update first_name
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can update last_name
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can update phone
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can update balance
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can block user (is_blocked: true)
Backend: Blocked user gets 403 on protected endpoints
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can unblock user (is_blocked: false)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can update password
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - can delete user
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - cannot delete admin users (400 error)
Backend: POST /api/admin/send-daily-digest works correctly
Backend: POST /api/admin/send-daily-digest requires admin auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/admin/notify-75-percent/{id} returns 404 for invalid competition
Backend: POST /api/admin/notify-75-percent/{id} requires admin auth (401)
Backend: Users response includes proper structure for is_blocked status
Frontend: Forgot Password page renders at /forgot-password
Frontend: Forgot Password page has email input with data-testid
Frontend: Forgot Password page has submit button with data-testid
Frontend: Forgot Password page has 'Back to Login' link
Frontend: Reset Password page renders at /reset-password
Frontend: Reset Password page shows error state when no token provided
Frontend: Reset Password page has 'Request New Link' button
Frontend: Login page has 'Ai uitat parola?' (Forgot Password) link
Frontend: Login page forgot password link points to /forgot-password
Frontend: Footer contains WhatsApp link with data-testid
Frontend: WhatsApp link has correct number (+40730268067)
Frontend: WhatsApp number displayed as '+40 730 268 067'
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab shows user list with Status column
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab has block buttons (14 found)
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab has delete buttons (14 found)
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab shows 'Activ' status badges
Frontend: Admin Panel Settings tab has Email Bot section
Frontend: Admin Panel Settings tab has 'Digest Zilnic' button
Frontend: Admin Panel Settings tab has '75% Notification' section with competition dropdown

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/21 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no competitions)

seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_ prefix for management tests (auto-cleaned after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Password reset flow (request + confirm endpoints), Admin user management (block/unblock/edit/delete), Email bot endpoints (daily digest + 75% notifications). Frontend pages render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. WhatsApp link in footer has correct number. Admin panel has Users tab with block/delete buttons and Settings tab with Email Bot section.

feature_verification_summary.password_reset_request: PASS - POST /api/auth/request-password-reset returns success, validates email format
feature_verification_summary.password_reset_confirm: PASS - POST /api/auth/reset-password validates token, rejects invalid/expired
feature_verification_summary.admin_get_users: PASS - GET /api/admin/users returns users with is_blocked status
feature_verification_summary.admin_update_user: PASS - PUT /api/admin/users/{id} can update first_name, last_name, phone, balance, is_blocked, password
feature_verification_summary.admin_delete_user: PASS - DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} works, cannot delete admin users
feature_verification_summary.blocked_user_auth: PASS - Blocked users get 403 on protected endpoints
feature_verification_summary.daily_digest_email: PASS - POST /api/admin/send-daily-digest sends emails to users
feature_verification_summary.forgot_password_page: PASS - Renders at /forgot-password with email input and submit button
feature_verification_summary.reset_password_page: PASS - Renders at /reset-password, shows error state without token
feature_verification_summary.login_forgot_link: PASS - Login page has 'Ai uitat parola?' link to /forgot-password
feature_verification_summary.footer_whatsapp: PASS - WhatsApp link with +40 730 268 067 in footer
